title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0148
summary: 1 This proceeding brings to this Court* another phase of the Hatch Act, 18 U.S.C.A. The petitioner, the State of Oklahoma, objects to the enforcement by the United States Civil Service Commission of § 12(a) of the act.1 2 France Paris has been a member of the State Highway Commission of Oklahoma ...
